message:
fix(func): improve round() precision for n>0 decimal places

Use string formatting (matching C SQLite's printf-based approach) for
n>0 to avoid intermediate float precision errors from multiply-floor-
divide. For n==0, use integer truncation with half-away-from-zero bias.

320 func tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
